query: postgresql index types btree gin gist performance

top_10.rationale: Official PostgreSQL documentation (v18) — '11.2. Index Types'. The canonical reference covering B-tree, Hash, GiST, SP-GiST, GIN, BRIN, and bloom. Primary source for all index type documentation.
Official PostgreSQL documentation (v18) — '65.4. GIN Indexes'. Deep documentation on GIN index internals, extensibility, and performance characteristics.
Official PostgreSQL documentation (v14 via Postgres Pro) — '11.2. Index Types'. Same canonical reference page for PostgreSQL 14, covering all index types.
Nile Documentation for the btree_gin extension — explains how btree_gin enables GIN indexes to support B-tree indexable data types, directly relevant to the query's B-tree/GIN intersection.

Postgres Pro technical series 'Indexes in PostgreSQL — 7 (GIN)' — deep technical treatment of GIN index internals by PostgreSQL's commercial support provider; series covers hash, B-tree, GiST, SP-GiST, GIN.
Postgres Professional 'Indexes in PostgreSQL — 5 (GiST)' — deep technical treatment of GiST internals from the official PostgreSQL support company; part of the same comprehensive index series.

Preprint 'Indexing in PostgreSQL: Performance Evaluation and Use Cases' — comprehensive performance evaluation of all six native index types (B-Tree, Hash, GiST, SP-GiST, GIN, BRIN) directly matching the query.
'Postgres Indexes Beyond B-Tree—GIN, GiST, BRIN, SP-GiST' — practical guide with performance benchmarks showing 20-1000x improvement over B-tree for specific use cases.
'PostgreSQL Indexes Best Practices: Choosing the Right Index for Every ...' — comprehensive production-oriented guide covering B-tree, GIN, GiST, BRIN with when-to-use guidance and pitfalls.

Academic paper 'A Comparative Experimental Study of Index Performance in MongoDB and PostgreSQL' — empirical performance evaluation of PostgreSQL indexes against MongoDB, providing comparative performance data.
